purpose: Compare KML data coverage against official denomination directories

PCA.ourData: 1,826 US churches (from PCA directory, includes missions/organizing)
PCA.coverage: COMPLETE - we have MORE than current established count

OPC.ourData: 276 US churches (from KML) + verified via opc.org locator
OPC.note: Anti-Zionist search was by Knox letter signatories, not individual church scan. All OPC Knox signatories identified regardless of KML coverage.

ARPC.note: Women deacons allowed denomination-wide. No anti-Zionist voices found.

RPCNA.ourData: 85 US from official site, 10 from KML

URCNA.coverage: 6% from KML, but denomination researched at org level
URCNA.note: No anti-Zionist voices found. Conservative split from CRC. No women ordination.

RCUS.coverage: 0% from KML, but denomination researched at org level
RCUS.note: No anti-Zionist voices found. No women ordination.

PRCA.coverage: 21% from KML, but denomination researched at org level
PRCA.note: No anti-Zionist voices found. No women ordination.

NRC.officialCount: ~15 US churches, 27 total in N. America
NRC.coverage: 0% from KML, but denomination researched at org level
NRC.note: Very conservative Dutch Reformed. No women ordination.

KAPC.coverage: Not in KML map at all
KAPC.note: Korean American Presbyterian. Westminster Standards. No women ordination. Not in KML.

KPCA.coverage: Not in KML map at all
KPCA.note: Korean Presbyterian (Kosin). Westminster Standards. No women ordination. Not in KML.

summary.methodology: Anti-Zionist identification used Knox Seminary Open Letter signatory matching, targeted web searches per denomination, Twitter/X scanning, and CAMERA article cross-referencing. This approach catches anti-Zionist pastors regardless of KML data completeness because we searched by pastor name and denomination, not by individual KML entries.
summary.missedChurches: The KML had incomplete data for URCNA (~108 missing), RCUS (35 missing), PRCA (~26 missing), NRC (~15 missing), and KAPC/KPCA (not in KML at all, ~785 churches). However, denomination-level anti-Zionist research found ZERO voices in any of these denominations, so the missing individual church data does not affect our anti-Zionist identification.
